title: psychotria bahiensis var. cornigera
intro: Psychotria bahiensis var. cornigera, also known as the Brazilian shrub or Bahian Psychotria, is a plant species from the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psychotria bahiensis var. cornigera include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving cardiovascular health and immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
